general.supportedLngs: Also this bot supports {{langs}} languages now, if you want to add more languages you can send a pull request to source code of bot.

start.t2: Click the button below or use the /helpb command for information on how to use the bot.

brat.useBratAsReply: Use /b as a reply to the message you want to quote.

sectionLng.pleaseSelect: Please select the category for which you need information / help.
sectionLng.firstMsg: If you reply to a message with the /b command, the bot will turn it into a brat sticker. If you want to customize the sticker, you can include the following parameters with the command:

commands.rbe: rbe: Removes the slight blur effect from the image.
commands.png: png: Sends it as a PNG instead of a sticker.
commands.scr: scr: Adds a scribble effect to the top
commands.color: [color]: Changes the background to green (gr is green, wh is white, bl is blue)

sectionLng.saveUsage: If you want, you can save generated brat stickers into group sticker pack with /bs command. That command doesn't needs any argument or something else.

help.lang: You can use /langb command for changing your language for this chat (only pm, group and supergroup is supported).

about.text1: If you'd like to view the source code, you can access it from this repository in GitHub. (don’t forget to give a ⭐)

baseErrs.onlyGroup: ⚠️ This command can be used only in groups and supergroups.
baseErrs.replyRequired: You need to reply a message for save it into sticker pack.
baseErrs.allowedMedia: To save it, you need to reply to a sticker or photo. Other types aren't allowed.
baseErrs.idIsUnknown: The sender of the message is unknown; please try again or ask someone else to save it.
baseErrs.invalidPerms: You must be an administrator to use this command.
baseErrs.maxSizeReached: The current group pack has reached its maximum number of stickers ({{maxSize}}), so a new pack is being created.

errs.ANIMATED_STICKERS_NOT_ALLOWED: ⚠️ Animated stickers and videos isn't allowed to add into pack.
errs.UNKNOWN_ERROR: ⚠️ An unknown error occurred in bot side, please try again or report that to bot developer.
errs.USER_NOT_STARTED_BOT: ⚠️ To create or manage sticker packs, Telegram requires you to start the bot in private messages first. Please click 👉 @brat_sticker_bot and press START, then try again.

save.SUCCESS_CREATE: A new sticker pack of brats for this group ({{chatName}}) has been created by {{userName}} right now. You can add more stickers with /bs command into that new pack.
save.SUCCESS_ADD: Sticker has been successfully added to the group brat sticker pack.
